        return path
    stack = [[start, length]]
    while stack:
        node, length = stack.pop()
        if node == end:
            path.append(node)
            path.append(length)
            return path
        for next in graph.get(node, []):
            if next not in path:
                stack.append([next, length + graph[node][next]])
